run.goal: Find why every health cycle marked the control server as unreachable.
run.outcome: The audit rule moved from the retired port to the documented management entry.

story.title: The server was healthy. The monitor was asking the wrong door.
story.hook: A production alert contradicted every public health signal.

scenes.title: Web checks stayed green
scenes.summary: Public API checks returned 200 while the SSH monitor failed.

interactions.label: Original signal
interactions.content: Three independent public checks remained healthy.

interactions.label: HTTP evidence
interactions.content: The public onboarding endpoint returned HTTP 200.

scenes.title: The alert would not stop
scenes.summary: The checker repeatedly attempted a management port that had already been retired.

interactions.label: Contradiction
interactions.content: Healthy service traffic and a failed legacy TCP check could both be true.

interactions.label: Operational cost
interactions.content: Every cycle generated another false production incident.

scenes.title: Treat the monitor as the suspect
scenes.summary: The agent compared the documented management entry with the fixed alert rule.

scenes.title: Signal restored
scenes.summary: The next cycle used the correct entry and the false incident disappeared.
